'''ây-ng-ng''' ('''kayangang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:channel|channel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:channel|channel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-ng-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kayangang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyangang|thiyangang]] || [[word:jiyangang|jiyangang]] || [[word:shiyangang|shiyangang]] || [[word:kiyangang|kiyangang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyangang|thuthuyangang]] || [[word:jujuyangang|jujuyangang]] || [[word:shushuyangang|shushuyangang]] || [[word:kukuyangang|kukuyangang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyangang|thuyangang]] || [[word:juyangang|juyangang]] || [[word:shuyangang|shuyangang]] || [[word:kuyangang|kuyangang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyangang|thuyangang]] || [[word:juyangang|juyangang]] || [[word:shuyangang|shuyangang]] || [[word:kuyangang|kuyangang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyangang|theyangang]] || [[word:jeyangang|jeyangang]] || [[word:sheyangang|sheyangang]] || [[word:keyangang|keyangang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyangang|thothoyangang]] || [[word:jojoyangang|jojoyangang]] || [[word:shoshoyangang|shoshoyangang]] || [[word:kokoyangang|kokoyangang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyangang|thoyangang]] || [[word:joyangang|joyangang]] || [[word:shoyangang|shoyangang]] || [[word:koyangang|koyangang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyangang|thoyangang]] || [[word:joyangang|joyangang]] || [[word:shoyangang|shoyangang]] || [[word:koyangang|koyangang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyangang|thĂŠyangang]] || [[word:jĂŠyangang|jĂŠyangang]] || [[word:shĂŠyangang|shĂŠyangang]] || [[word:kĂŠyangang|kĂŠyangang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayangang|thathayangang]] || [[word:jajayangang|jajayangang]] || [[word:shashayangang|shashayangang]] || [[word:kakayangang|kakayangang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayangang|thayangang]] || [[word:jayangang|jayangang]] || [[word:shayangang|shayangang]] || [[word:kayangang|kayangang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayangang|thayangang]] || [[word:jayangang|jayangang]] || [[word:shayangang|shayangang]] || [[word:kayangang|kayangang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayangang|shayangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayangang|goshayangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayangang|gokishayangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayangangnĂŒ|shayangangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayangangnknĂŒ|goshayangangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayangangnĂŒ|gokishayangangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayangangshĂ«|shayangangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayangangnkshĂ«|goshayangangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayangangshĂ«|gokishayangangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayangangro|shayangangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangangnkro|goshayangangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayangangro|gokishayangangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayangangmu|shayangangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangangnkmu|goshayangangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayangangmu|gokishayangangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayangangsher|shayangangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayangangnksher|goshayangangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayangangsher|gokishayangangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayangang|shayangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayangangnkng|goshayangangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayangang|gokishayangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayangangya|shayangangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayangangnkya|goshayangangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayangangya|gokishayangangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayangangyam|shayangangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayangangnkyam|goshayangangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayangangyam|gokishayangangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayangangnĂŒshĂ«|shayangangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayangangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayangangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayangangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayangangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayangangnĂŒro|shayangangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangangnknĂŒro|goshayangangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayangangnĂŒro|gokishayangangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayangangnĂŒmu|shayangangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangangnknĂŒmu|goshayangangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayangangnĂŒmu|gokishayangangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayangangshĂ«nĂŒ|shayangangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayangangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayangangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayangangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayangangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayangangshĂ«ro|shayangangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangangnkshĂ«ro|goshayangangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayangangshĂ«ro|gokishayangangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayangangshĂ«mu|shayangangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangangnkshĂ«mu|goshayangangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayangangshĂ«mu|gokishayangangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayangangronĂŒ|shayangangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayangangnkronĂŒ|goshayangangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayangangronĂŒ|gokishayangangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayangangroshĂ«|shayangangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayangangnkroshĂ«|goshayangangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayangangroshĂ«|gokishayangangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayangangromu|shayangangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangangnkromu|goshayangangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayangangromu|gokishayangangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayangangmunĂŒ|shayangangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayangangnkmunĂŒ|goshayangangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayangangmunĂŒ|gokishayangangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayangangmushĂ«|shayangangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayangangnkmushĂ«|goshayangangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayangangmushĂ«|gokishayangangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayangangmuro|shayangangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangangnkmuro|goshayangangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayangangmuro|gokishayangangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
